segments.text: For Zion's sake I will not hold My peace, And for Jerusalem's sake I will not rest, Until her righteousness goes forth as brightness, And her salvation as a lamp that burns.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The Gentiles shall see your righteousness, And all kings your glory.
You shall be called by a new name, Which the mouth of the Lord will name.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall also be a crown of glory In the hand of the Lord, And a royal diadem In the hand of your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall no longer be termed Forsaken, Nor shall your land any more be termed Desolate; But you shall be called Hephzibah, and your land Beulah; For the Lord delights in you, And your land shall be married.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For as a young man marries a virgin, So shall your sons marry you; And as the bridegroom rejoices over the bride, So shall your God rejoice over you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have set watchmen on your walls, O Jerusalem; They shall never hold their peace day or night. You who make mention of the Lord, do not keep silent,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And give Him no rest till He establishes And till He makes Jerusalem a praise in the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Surely I will no longer give your grain As food for your enemies; And the sons of the foreigner shall not drink your new wine, For which you have labored.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: But those who have gathered it shall eat it, And praise the Lord; Those who have brought it together shall drink it in My holy courts.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Go through, Go through the gates! Prepare the way for the people; Build up, Build up the highway! Take out the stones, Lift up a banner for the peoples!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Indeed the Lord has proclaimed To the end of the world:
Say to the daughter of Zion, 'Surely your salvation is coming; Behold, His reward is with Him, And His work before Him.'
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And they shall call them The Holy People, The Redeemed of the Lord; And you shall be called Sought Out, A City Not Forsaken.
segments.speaker: The Lord
